# NimoteCode

> NimoteCode is a mobile-first IDE and developer workspace for iPhone, iPad, and Android. It combines SSH workspaces, code editing, terminals, Git workflows, AI assistance, debugging, tasks, timeline diagnostics, sync/cache, and product support in one app.

NimoteCode is organized around a few primary journeys: learn the product, compare Free and Pro, install the app, and move into the documentation for day-to-day workflows.

## Product
- [Home](https://nimotecode.com/): Main product overview and demo-led landing page.
- [Features](https://nimotecode.com/features): Core capabilities and workflow summary.
- [Pro](https://nimotecode.com/pro): Free vs Pro comparison and upgrade value.
- [Download](https://nimotecode.com/download): Store links and installation steps.
- [Use Cases](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/): Scenario overview for urgent mobile development work.

## Documentation
- [Quick Start](https://nimotecode.com/docs/quick-start): First-run setup and workspace basics.
- [SSH Workspace](https://nimotecode.com/docs/ssh): Remote connections and workspace setup.
- [Editor](https://nimotecode.com/docs/editor): Editing workflow and navigation.
- [Terminal](https://nimotecode.com/docs/terminal): Terminal sessions and command execution.
- [Search](https://nimotecode.com/docs/search): Project and output search guidance.
- [Source Control](https://nimotecode.com/docs/source-control): Git review and write workflows.
- [AI Assistant](https://nimotecode.com/docs/ai): AI chat and agent usage.
- [LSP](https://nimotecode.com/docs/lsp): Language server diagnostics and code actions.
- [Debug](https://nimotecode.com/docs/debug): Breakpoints, call stacks, variables, and watch views.
- [Tasks](https://nimotecode.com/docs/tasks): Task creation and execution.
- [Timeline](https://nimotecode.com/docs/timeline): Event inspection and root-cause workflows.
- [Sync / Cache](https://nimotecode.com/docs/sync-cache): Workspace movement and cache flows.

## Use Cases
- [Remote Hotfix](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/remote-hotfix): Patch production from a phone.
- [On-call Diagnostics](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/on-call-diagnostics): Investigate incidents while away from a desk.
- [AI Agent Workflows](https://nimotecode.com/use-cases/ai-agent): Use AI inside a real development workflow.

## Support and Policy
- [Support](https://nimotecode.com/support): Help and contact information.
- [Privacy](https://nimotecode.com/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](https://nimotecode.com/terms): Terms of service.
- [Account Deletion](https://nimotecode.com/account-delete): Account deletion instructions.

## Locales
- [English](https://nimotecode.com/): Default site locale.
- [Chinese](https://nimotecode.com/zh/): Simplified Chinese locale.
- [Japanese](https://nimotecode.com/ja/): Japanese locale.
- [Korean](https://nimotecode.com/ko/): Korean locale.
- [Russian](https://nimotecode.com/ru/): Russian locale.
- [Spanish](https://nimotecode.com/es/): Spanish locale.
